languages.text: "Почему вы отправляетесь за мечом один? Вы нужны Простору Коронус!"
"Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"
languages.original_text: "Почему вы отправляетесь за мечом один? Вы нужны Простору Коронус!"

traits.locale_text: "Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"
"Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"
"Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"
"Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"

languages.text: "Warum macht Ihr allein Jagd auf die Klinge? Die Koronus-Ausdehnung braucht Euch!"
languages.original_text: "Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"

traits.locale_text: "Warum macht Ihr allein Jagd auf die Klinge? Die Koronus-Ausdehnung braucht Euch!"

languages.text: « Pourquoi partir chercher l'épée tout seul ? Les Étendues de Koronus ont besoin de vous ! »
languages.original_text: "Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi partir chercher l'épée tout seul ? Les Étendues de Koronus ont besoin de vous ! »

languages.text: «¿Por qué persigue la espada en solitario? ¡La Extensión de Koronus le necesita!».
languages.original_text: "Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué persigue la espada en solitario? ¡La Extensión de Koronus le necesita!».

languages.text: "Kılıcın peşine neden tek başına düşüyorsun? Koronus Enginliği'nin sana ihtiyacı var!"
languages.original_text: "Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"

traits.locale_text: "Kılıcın peşine neden tek başına düşüyorsun? Koronus Enginliği'nin sana ihtiyacı var!"

languages.text: “你为什么非要独自去找那把剑？科罗努斯扩区需要你！”
languages.original_text: "Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"

traits.locale_text: “你为什么非要独自去找那把剑？科罗努斯扩区需要你！”

languages.text: 「なぜあなたは刃を追いかけるの？ コロヌス・エクスパンスはあなたが必要だ！」
languages.original_text: "Why are you going after the blade alone? The Koronus Expanse needs you!"

traits.locale_text: 「なぜあなたは刃を追いかけるの？ コロヌス・エクスパンスはあなたが必要だ！」
